name: clean-feature
description: A clean PR with descriptive title, body explaining why, tests, focused diff, and multiple descriptive commits

pr.title: Add rate limiting to login endpoint
pr.body:
## Why

We've been seeing brute-force login attempts in production logs (fixes #123). Without rate limiting, attackers can try unlimited password combinations.

## What

- Added a `RateLimiter` class that tracks attempts per IP using an in-memory store
- Integrated it into the login route as middleware
- Added unit tests for the limiter and integration test for the route

## How to test

1. Run `npm test -- --grep rate-limit`
2. Start the dev server and try logging in 6 times with wrong password — 6th attempt should return 429

commits.message: feat: add RateLimiter class with sliding window
commits.author: alice
